---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new persona, voice, or capability
labels: enhancement
---

## What would you like to add or change?

<!-- Persona? Voice? Config option? New AI provider support? Something else? -->

## What problem does it solve?

<!-- Who would use this, and what would they no longer have to do manually? -->

## What would the output look like?

<!-- If this is a persona or voice, paste an example of the release note style you're going for. -->

## Anything else?

<!-- Prior art, related issues, or context that would help us understand the request. -->
